description: A shipment is held at a port because the batch number on the bill of lading does not match the batch number on the container. Logistics must resolve this urgently.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the original sales order and the shipping documents generated for the shipment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls up the sales order, packing list, and bill of lading.

nodes.task_description: Compare the documents to the batch record to identify the source of the typo.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the correct batch number from the manufacturing record and finds the typo was on the bill of lading.

nodes.task_description: Contact the freight forwarder, provide the correct information, and request an amended bill of lading to release the shipment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully communicates with the carrier and gets the documentation corrected.
